info.title: Aspose.Font Convert Micro Application for .NET
info.description: Aspose.Font Convert Micro Application allows you to convert your font via the command line or add a font convert feature to your .NET application.

commands.name: convert
commands.description: Convert the font using command line interface.

options.name: --input
options.description: The path to the input font file.

options.name: --output
options.description: The path for the converted font.

options.name: --format
options.description: The format for the converted font.

options.name: --license
options.description: The path to the Aspose.Font .NET license file.

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Enable verbose output for detailed logging. [default: False]

commands.name: add
commands.description: Add reference to the MicroApps API to your project.

options.name: --project
options.description: Path to the project for the addition of the reference to the MicroApps API.
